prompt: My body text feels hard to read. Lines feel too long and too cramped vertically. I'm using 16px font with 1.2 line height in a full-width container. What should I fix?
assertions: Identifies that full-width text is too wide and recommends a maximum line length (around 45-75 characters or ~65ch)
Identifies that 1.2 line-height is too tight for body text and recommends a higher value (around 1.5-1.6)
Explains that line-height should be proportional to line length
Gives specific numeric recommendations (e.g., max-width: 65ch, line-height: 1.5)
